name: faq-section
title: FAQ Section with Review-Card Accordion
description: Centered FAQ section with a peach eyebrow pill, live search input filtering questions in real time, and list of white rounded accordion cards. Each card reveals a nested customer review testimonial block with 5-star rating.

preview.reason: Imports app-specific providers (auth, cart, product data) that can't be mocked in isolation. Preserved as code-reference.
